applied_optimizations.name: Fused Triton kernel for LeakyReLU+Sum+Clamp+GELU
applied_optimizations.description: Implemented a fused Triton kernel that combines LeakyReLU, sum with broadcasted tensor, clamp, and exact GELU (using tl.math.erf) into a single kernel. Key fixes from failed attempt: (1) Used exact GELU with tl.math.erf instead of tanh approximation, (2) Fixed channel index calculation to use (offset // stride(1)) % num_channels, (3) Explicit float32 casting for loads/stores, (4) BLOCK_SIZE aligned to 64 for CDNA4 wavefront.

attempted_but_failed.name: Tanh-based GELU approximation
attempted_but_failed.reason: Numerical precision issue - max diff 0.000153 exceeded tolerance of 0.0001

top_bottlenecks: Conv3d operation dominates - not optimized in this stage

notes: PyTorch F.gelu() uses exact GELU with erf, not tanh approximation
tl.math.erf IS available on ROCm Triton - use it for exact GELU
Channel index calculation: (offset // stride(1)) % num_channels for (N, C, D, H, W) layout
BLOCK_SIZE should be multiple of 64 for CDNA4 wavefront alignment

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_4
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 4 produced no output at all — agent failed silently for the third consecutive time. Providing extremely explicit copy-paste instructions to first verify the existing solution, then apply torch.c

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_5
attempted_but_failed.reason: Agent has failed silently 4 consecutive times (trials 2-5). Providing a complete copy-paste solution file with torch.compile on conv3d plus the existing fused Triton kernel. 47 minutes remain — this i

global_notes: Final SCORE: 62.8 with 1.28x speedup over PyTorch reference
